turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I'm really struggling with my coworker, Alex. He's always undermining me in front of others and it’s making the work environment toxic.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That sounds incredibly frustrating. Have you tried talking to him directly about how his behavior is affecting you? Sometimes people don't realize their actions are causing issues.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I did try, but he just got defensive and said I was being too sensitive. Now everyone thinks there's a problem with me.

turns.speaker: assistant
turns.text: That must be really tough to handle. Have you considered speaking to your manager about the situation? They might be able to mediate or address it in a professional manner.
